All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

R

RaceCar - Class in Unnamed Package
This class represents a racecar as a record/object in the DMS.
RaceCar() - Constructor for class RaceCar
Creates an empty race car object.
RaceCar(int, String, String, int, double, boolean) - Constructor for class RaceCar
Creates an race car object with data.
RaceCarDBManager - Class in Unnamed Package
This child class contains business logic to perform CRUD operations to the RaceCar database.
RaceCarDBManager() - Constructor for class RaceCarDBManager
Initializes the manager with no connection and a query helper.
RaceCarManager - Class in Unnamed Package
This parent class provides validation logic for RaceCarDBManager class.
RaceCarManager() - Constructor for class RaceCarManager
Initializes a new empty array list which holds race car objects.
RaceCars - Class in DBHelper
This is a child class which contains generated code by SQLHelper to perform SQL action to a sqlite database.
RaceCars() - Constructor for class DBHelper.RaceCars
 
raceValid(RaceCar, RaceCar) - Method in class RaceCarManager
This method checks if the conditions of the race are valid.
refreshRaceCarTable() - Method in class MainFrame
This method refreshes the JTable in the GUI to reflect current data from the database
removeRaceCar(int) - Method in class RaceCarDBManager
This method removes a race car from the database.
